original_code:
module TopModule (
    input [7:0] pixel00,
    input [7:0] pixel01,
    input [7:0] pixel02,
    input [7:0] pixel10,
    input [7:0] pixel11,
    input [7:0] pixel12,
    input [7:0] pixel20,
    input [7:0] pixel21,
    input [7:0] pixel22,
    output reg [7:0] blurred_pixel
);

always @(*) begin
    blurred_pixel = (pixel00 * 1 + pixel01 * 2 + pixel02 * 1 +
                     pixel10 * 2 + pixel11 * 4 + pixel12 * 2 +
                     pixel20 * 1 + pixel21 * 2 + pixel22 * 1) >> 4;
end

endmodule
adversarial_code:
module TopModule (
    input [7:0] pixel00,
    input [7:0] pixel01,
    input [7:0] pixel02,
    input [7:0] pixel10,
    input [7:0] pixel11,
    input [7:0] pixel12,
    input [7:0] pixel20,
    input [7:0] pixel21,
    input [7:0] pixel22,
    output reg [7:0] blurred_pixel
);
    always @(*) begin
        blurred_pixel = (pixel00 * 1 + pixel01 * 2 + pixel02 * 1 +
                         pixel10 * 2 + pixel11 * 4 + pixel12 * 2 +
                         pixel20 * 1 + pixel21 * 2 + pixel22 * 1) >> 4;
    end
endmodule
